introSection: Jul's RollerSkates is a steel roller coaster located at Julianatoren in Apeldoorn, Gelderland, Netherlands. From 1993 to 2013, the ride was known as Super Achtbaan.

sections.title: Design
sections.content: After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

fullText:
Jul's RollerSkates is a steel roller coaster located at Julianatoren in Apeldoorn, Gelderland, Netherlands. From 1993 to 2013, the ride was known as Super Achtbaan.

After the train climbs the lift hill, riders travel through several of twists and turns before reaching the brake run.

White track and green supports.
